violations.detail: No abstract SubComponent base class exists in the progressstepper package; ProgressStep extends SubComponent directly instead of a shared base like ProgressStepperSubComponent
ProgressStep extends SubComponent directly instead of a package-private abstract base class
Instance section separator uses 55 dashes instead of the required 54: '// ------------------------------------------------------- instance'
Non-standard section '// ------------------------------------------ package-private' uses wrong dash count and non-standard section name; should use 'internal' with 54 dashes
Sections appear out of order: 'aria' (line 124) appears before 'builder' (line 129); expected order is builder then aria
No blank line after the 'factory' section separator on line 57

Implements clause formatting: ElementTextDelegate and HasIdentifier are on the same line as 'implements', then ComponentIcon on the next line; each interface should be on its own line with 8-space indent
that() method appears outside any section header, before aria and builder sections; should be the last method inside the builder section
Static Logger field appears after SUB_COMPONENT_ID/SUB_COMPONENT_NAME public static final constants; Logger should be the first static field
@see link URL has trailing slash 'progress-stepper/' instead of 'progress-stepper' (minor inconsistency with other components)
